general.title: Combine Annotations [SPAC][DMAP]
general.instructions: Combine multiple annotations into a new annotation using a defined separator.\ Please refer to DUET Documentation,  GitHub Documentation

parameters.name: Annotations Names
parameters.description: List of annotations to be combined.

parameters.name: New Annotation Name
parameters.description: Annotation to be added to the dataset, containing the new labels after concatenation.

parameters.name: Separator
parameters.description: A string to add between labels during concatenations.
